Appearances:
Plaintiff Anton Jaber is present.
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Eduardo Evangelista and Araceli Evangelista are present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
